name: Guided AI Labs Command Center Homepage Refinement
safetyLimits: No replacement of the current homepage
No app grants or consent changes

homepage.purpose: AI-first company command center with operating cockpit access immediately visible.
homepage.routingDefault: Pages first, with direct List, Planner, library, or evidence links near the top of each page.
homepage.cardMode: Text-only first; dashboard counts later after source records are stable.

commandCards.title: New Intake
commandCards.statusLine: Open items, new requests, and discovery starts.

commandCards.title: Active Delivery
commandCards.statusLine: Work in motion across clients, builds, and operations.

commandCards.title: Decisions Needed
commandCards.statusLine: Scope, access, governance, and delivery choices to clear.

commandCards.title: Client Readiness
commandCards.statusLine: Discovery, assessments, workspace models, and next reviews.

commandCards.title: Automation And Agents
commandCards.statusLine: Proposed automations, agent setup, and tool permission reviews.

commandCards.title: Handoffs And Evidence
commandCards.statusLine: Handoff packets, readiness evidence, and closeout records.

activeWorkSnapshot.purpose: Active delivery, internal build, client discovery, or operating work in motion.
Approvals, reviews, access, decisions, or clarifications that need Adam.
Stuck work, unresolved governance, permission gaps, stale handoffs, or risks.
The few actions that keep momentum without opening a new branch of work.

clientPathwaySnapshot.toolsetDirection: Intake form, discovery checklist, stakeholder/context capture, initial fit notes.
Readiness worksheet, evidence prompts, governance/access review, risk and opportunity summary.
Workspace model decision, tenant/client ownership map, access model, minimum surface plan.
Active delivery plan, tasks, decisions, working docs, automation/tool review.
Handoff packet, training path, ownership notes, review date, archive/export plan.

operationalReadiness.name: Operational Readiness
operationalReadiness.placement: Homepage band first; dedicated page later only if real use justifies it.
operationalReadiness.orientation: Operations and readiness are combined. Internal clients and external clients both move through the same operating cockpit.

dashboardRunway.sourceCandidates: List views, Planner buckets, Decision Register, Handoff Packet Register

dashboardRunway.shape: Filtered SharePoint/List views embedded on pages
dashboardRunway.sourceCandidates: Microsoft Lists views, Planner, document libraries

dashboardRunway.shape: Power BI or Microsoft Graph-backed dashboard
dashboardRunway.sourceCandidates: Cross-list metrics, delivery cycle, readiness score, automation review aging
Reviewed summaries, graph handoffs, mission status, evidence references

futureMetrics: Internal and external client readiness reviews due
